The Slammer.notes: best overall Eager sword, Adept Mag access + Cold Steel + vortex frame

Sullen Claw.notes: best light attack neutral + okay damage with bumped impact

Aurora Dawn.notes: no Relentless hurts, otherwise probably best neutral (Flash + Cold)

Summum Bonum.notes: worse impact than newer waves, but still good perks

Abyssal Edge.notes: similar to Summum with better neutral and worse DPS-focused perks

Falling Guillotine.notes: bad frame but has Surrounded option

The Other Half.notes: good roam option for Eager + Surrounded heavy attacks

Eighty-Six.notes: okay perks but worst frame, notable ability regen niche

Goldtusk.notes: interesting frame, arguably most consistent light spammer

Zephyr.notes: Attrition + semi-unique neutral on top of B tier features

Temptation's Hook.notes: worse ammo than Ill Omen, no Surrounded, better origin

Crown-Splitter.notes: consistent light spammer, worse than Goldtusk though

False Idols.notes: bad frame but Attrition makes up for it

Death's Razor.notes: bad frame but has Surrounded option

Half-Truths.notes: worst Eager sword but more useful than Surrounded-only swords

Throne-Cleaver.notes: no Relentless or Whirlwind, frame decent

Chivalric Fire.notes: outdone by Flash Counter swords for neutral, no damage perk

Returned Memory.notes: excellent perks all around with solid origin

Lotus-Eater.notes: excellent perks, only StL rocket sidearm, mediocre origin

Tinasha's Mastery.notes: great ammo generator, solid perks and decent origin

Aberrant Action.notes: better origin than Returned but worse alternative perks

Indebted Kindness.notes: good Voltshot user, Lead also appreciated, situational origin

The Call.notes: only Slice rocket sidearm, good origin and utility perks

Unfall.notes: worse than Indebted besides enhanceable perks

Keraunios.notes: StL + Chain best overall trace roll, also FTTC + TL for "damage"

Chronophage.notes: StL + utility/splash options, great origin trait for low-tier content

Unsworn.notes: probably as good as it gets for the kinetic slot, perks + origin excellent

Retraced Path.notes: overshadowed by Chronophage, still decent perks

Path of Least Resistance.notes: feels excellent but objectively worse than Chronophage

Incisor.notes: only Slice trace, usable in niche endgame scenarios

Action Item.notes: best Stasis synergy trace, not much utility otherwise

Hollow Denial.notes: only Lead trace, otherwise not very good

Warlord's Spear.notes: same issues as Keraunios, slightly better origin and worse perks

Appetence.notes: Headstone not bad on traces, but nothing special

VS Chill Inhibitor.notes: almost every possible BiS perk on a heavy GL, origin decent too

The Ever-Present.notes: best non-Cascade + damage perk rapid HGL option

Outrageous Fortune.notes: free exhaust origin + solid damage perks + good archetype

Edge Transit.notes: (BRAVE version) Envious Assassin worse than Arsenal, but has sticky + EL access

Cataphract GL3.notes: run of the mill Envious/BnS adaptive

Hullabaloo.notes: solid ammo generation perks, underrated add clear archetype

Regnant.notes: one of two sticky EL heavy GLs, otherwise unremarkable

Dimensional Hypotrochoid.notes: similar perks to Hullabaloo, decent origin too

Acosmic.notes: no really solid DPS reload perk but good otherwise

Marsilion-C.notes: irrelevant due to Cascade in wrong column and no good damage perk

Wendigo GL3.notes: okay for burst but completely outdated

Berenger's Memory.notes: ALH in 2nd column and useless 1st column

Scintillation.notes: basically perfect LFR roll, maybe Honing one day

Mistral Lift.notes: Arsenal worse than Rewind for dump-style weapon

Boomslang-4fr.notes: worse damage perks than S tier options

Doomed Petitioner.notes: Assassin worse than Arsenal on Boomslang

Cataclysmic.notes: still highest total damage linear, excellent FTTC user

Briar's Contempt.notes: more situational Rewind linear, but still solid

Line in the Sand.notes: worse archetype than Stormchaser but better damage perk

Eyes Unveiled.notes: only Discord heavy at current time

Fire and Forget.notes: worse damage perk than Taipan but better archetype

Suspectum-4fr.notes: no ammo gen precision, okay damage perks

Sailspy Pitchglass.notes: no ammo gen precision and mediocre damage perks

Laser Painter.notes: no ammo gen precision and mediocre damage perks

Threaded Needle.notes: no ammo gen precision and mediocre damage perks

Tarantula.notes: bad damage perk and no ammo gen

Corsair's Wrath.notes: bad damage perk and no ammo gen

Song of Ir Yut.notes: excellent origin trait and great neutral perks

Qua Vinctus IV.notes: great overall perk combo, archetype is decent

Pro Memoria.notes: solid origin and great neutral perks

Ulterior Observation.notes: solid origin and great neutral perks

Corrective Measure.notes: great origin and good neutral perks with option for double splash/damage

Terminus Horizon.notes: awkward Voltshot user, technically double splash option

Commemoration.notes: solid neutral combos but nothing special

Hammerhead.notes: (BRAVE version) no Demo in first column, no splash in second column

Avalanche.notes: decent first column, splash in second but no consistent damage perk

Unwavering Duty.notes: no Demo in first column, splash in first is interesting but combos aren't great

Speleologist.notes: Envious usable on LMGs, great origin, just missing good loader perk

Archon's Thunder.notes: classic stasis perk combo, just no good loader perk

Watchful Eye.notes: Arc splash perks mediocre on LMGs, okay first column

Marcato-45.notes: Demo + decent second column on okay archetype

Qua Xaphan V.notes: good origin but bad first column

Fixed Odds.notes: no loader perk, good archetype + splash perk though

Bitter End.notes: questionable first column but solid 2nd column for arc, awful ammo gen

Planck's Stride.notes: decent melee combo but overshadowed by plenty of other options

A Fine Memorial.notes: no splash and mediocre first column

Shattered Cipher.notes: ALH but mediocre second column with awful recoil

Qullim's Terminus.notes: would've been decent with any other first column

Circular Logic.notes: mediocre first and bad second column, decent origin

Seventh Seraph SAW.notes: ALH but situational mediocre damage perk

THE SWARM.notes: no loader perk and mediocre splash perk + damage perk

Thermal Erosion.notes: no loader perk and mediocre splash perk with no damage perks

Hezen Vengeance.notes: double damage options, insane origin, Bipod swap option

The When and Where.notes: missing Envious but great otherwise as a burst specialist

Cold Comfort.notes: very limited use case due to no loader perk besides Envious Assassin

Cynosure.notes: worst origin of the best rockets, perk pool still competitive though

Tomorrow's Answer.notes: interesting option post-reserve nerf, frame difference

Apex Predator.notes: solid perk pool, origin just useless and no Envious

Crux Termination IV.notes: doubles as add clear Pack rocket thanks to origin, damage perks are niche

Haliaetus.notes: decent perk combos, just not the best frame

Heretic's Fervor.notes: not as versatile as Crux but similar quality origin

Micromort.notes: decent for Pack add clear, worst archetype for damage

Braytech Osprey.notes: among the best for Pack add clear

Faith-Keeper.notes: among the best for Pack add clear

Crowning Duologue.notes: among the best for Pack add clear

Sleepless.notes: little worse than the best add clear options but still good

Semiotician.notes: little worse than the best add clear options but still good

Bump in the Night.notes: solid archetype but very outdated damage perks

Code Duello.notes: okay archetype with outdated damage perks

Roar of the Bear.notes: okay archetype with outdated damage perks

Palmyra-B.notes: ALH but precision and outdated damage eprk

Hoosegow.notes: ALH but Cluster as best damage perk

Bad Omens.notes: ALH but Cluster as best damage perk

Royal Entry.notes: ALH but precision and outdated damage perk

Ascendancy.notes: dump rocket with outdated perks and bad frame

Opaque Hourglass.notes: no double damage but solid reload/damage perks

A Good Shout.notes: potential damage option if High Ground is usable on a boss

Refurbished A499.notes: first of its kind; powerful archetype with mediocre 1st column
